title: Algebra
description: Understand linear equations, systems of equations, and their applications in solving game logic issues like trigger checks.
learningObjectives: Use algebraic transformations for trigger boundaries
Solve systems of linear equations for intercepting moving objects

sections.title: Algebra in Gameplay Code
sections.content: Algebra forms the foundation of all game physics, AI calculations, and graphics positioning. Simple algebraic equations allow us to calculate target hit points, interpolate positions, or evaluate scaling factors. Solving system of equations is highly critical for mechanics like projectile target interception (e.g. predicting where an arrow needs to be fired to hit a running player).

sections.title: Linear Interpolation (Lerp)
